mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate reduce corporate borrowing costs and compress equity discount rates, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns are negative in greater than 55 percent of rate-cut periods over a three-year walk-forward test.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions and reduced consumer spending power, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises greater than 0.5pp in 3 months
failure_condition: Positive 20-day returns occur in greater than 60 percent of instances when the unemployment rate crosses the specified threshold.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous declines in real personal income and housing starts indicate a broad contraction in consumer demand, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to predict negative returns with a Rank IC greater than 0.05 over any rolling two-year window.

mechanism_narrative: Sharp month-over-month drops in industrial production reflect immediate supply chain bottlenecks and factory slowdowns, triggering negative S&P 500 forward returns within one week.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns show no statistical significance with a p-value greater than 0.10 during periods of industrial production contraction.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating consumer price inflation forces expectations of tighter monetary policy, compressing equity valuations and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL MoM change greater than 0.4 percent
failure_condition: S&P 500 returns remain positive in greater than 50 percent of high-inflation months over a five-year backtest.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between rising total employment and rising unemployment indicates labor force participation shifts rather than genuine job growth, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: The divergence signal produces a positive Rank IC greater than 0.04 over rolling three-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Higher quarterly real GDP growth reflects stronger corporate earnings fundamentals, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month as investors price in improved profitability.
failure_condition: Forward returns are negative in greater than 55 percent of quarters where GDP growth exceeds the ten-year historical average.

mechanism_narrative: A sudden contraction in industrial output combined with stagnant employment signals an imminent economic slowdown, causing immediate negative S&P 500 forward returns within one week.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO drops greater than 1.0 percent MoM while PAYEMS growth is below 0.1 percent
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are positive in greater than 60 percent of triggered instances during historical economic slowdowns.
